title: Velvet Peruvian Cheonggukjang Ceviche
description: A buttery, aerated tiradito style ceviche using fermented soybean paste and bonito shavings, served on a wooden board for a low-fat Peruvian twist.
instructions: Thinly slice the cucumber into matchstick strips of equal length.
In a bowl mix the cheonggukjang, lime juice, rice vinegar, chili powder, and salt until smooth.
Add the bonito shavings to the sauce and gentle stir to incorporate.
Place the cucumber strips on a wooden board and pour the sauce over them, ensuring even coverage.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a few extra bonito shavings for aroma.
Let the mixture rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve immediately with a side of fresh lettuce leaves for a crisp bite.
Enjoy the velvety and aerated texture of this Peruvian tiradito.
